_comment: Diagram/chart colors (data for src/diagram.mjs and hand-authored inline SVGs). v0.6.1: unified with the box system's ink-blue family + single warm accent, so diagrams are hermetic with prose (no arbitrary saturated hues). 'ink' names the roles a schematic vector/annotation needs; use these tokens in hand-drawn SVGs instead of raw hex. chartSeries follows the same discipline: one ink-blue ramp for magnitude, the warm accent only where a series genuinely means 'caution/other'.
